note: RPC ACTIVITY card surfaces real errors instead of staying silent at '—'. When the node returns Method not found (binary built before getrpcstats was added), the card now shows 'n/a — node missing getrpcstats — restart with V12 build' in amber. Click-to-expand panel shows the exact rebuild + restart command. Other RPC errors (network, auth, etc) surface their message instead of a silent dash. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
